status_meanings.restored-draft: Readable restored translation exists, but source-audit metadata is incomplete.
status_meanings.source-audited-draft: Verse-by-verse source-language review has been applied for major wording, grammar, context, and interpretive choices. Final scholarly review may still refine details.
status_meanings.source-critical: Textual variants and manuscript witnesses have also been reviewed where relevant.

chapters.notes: Garden, human from ground, breath, ezer kenegdo, body without shame.
Serpent, shame, consequence, mortality, guarded tree of life.
Cain/Abel, sin crouching at doorway, blood crying from ground, Cain sign, Lamech, Seth/Enosh.
Adam-to-Noah genealogy, image/likeness, mortality formula, Enoch walking with God, Noah comfort wordplay.
Sons of God, Nephilim, corruption, divine grief, Noah righteousness, ark and covenant.
Ark entry, clean/not-clean animals, flood waters, breath of life, remnant.
Divine remembering, wind over waters, raven/dove, altar, promise of creation rhythms.
Post-flood blessing, blood/life boundary, covenant bow, Noah vineyard, Canaan warning.
Table of Nations, Nimrod, Babel/Shinar setup, languages/lands/families/nations.
Babel, language confusion, scattering, Shem-to-Abram genealogy, Sarai barrenness, journey toward Canaan.

next_actions: Continue with Genesis 12-25 batch: Abram/Abraham and Sarah cycle.
Add glossary files for recurring terms introduced in Genesis 1-11.
Later promote chapters to source-critical after textual variant and manuscript witness review.
